response:
<<url transformation>>

In PHP replace one URL with another within a string  
Use a regular expression to find and replace  
Match the pattern of a URL in the text  
Replace the matched URL with the new one  

Use preg_replace with a callback function  
Ensure the replacement works for all instances  
Check for the start and end of the URL  
Avoid affecting other parts of the text  

Example string contains a link  
Replace the old URL with the new one  
The result is a modified string  
The process is simple but precise  

A palindrome is a word that reads the same  
Forward and backward like madam or racecar  
It is a string that mirrors itself  
Use it to test the replacement function  

The string is transformed correctly  
The new URL appears in the link  
The palindrome remains unchanged  
The solution meets all the requirements
